name: Caesar Salad

ingredients.item: head of romaine lettuce cut up

method: In a salad bowl, combine lettuce, parmesan slices, and croutons.Sprinkle with salt and pepper, toss, and set aside. In a small bowl, combine mayonnaise, Dijon mustard, Worcesterhire sauce, anchovy paste, shredded parmesan, and garlic until well blended. Toss dressing into salad right before serving. You can add more salt and pepper depending on your diet and taste. Since this isn’t a salad that you can eat every day because it is super fattening, I only make it occasionally, so for a special treat, I serve it with steak and mashed potatoes. Serves 2-3. Olé
